parameters.command: =GW=/app/cubeos/claude-context && LOCK_FILE="{{ $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile }}" && if [ -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE ]; then if [ $(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y $GW/$LOCK_FILE) )) -gt 600 ]; then echo FREE; else echo LOCKED; fi; else echo FREE; fi

=GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
DB="$GW/gateway.db"
MSG_B64="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.base64Message }}"
ROOM="{{ $('Extract Messages').first().json.sourceRoom }}"
LOCK_FILE="{{ $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile }}"

# Get issue ID from slot-specific lock file
ISSUE_ID=""
if [ -f "$GW/$LOCK_FILE" ]; then
  ISSUE_ID=$(cat "$GW/$LOCK_FILE" | tr -d '\n')
fi

PIDFILE="/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"

# Try inject if PID file exists and PID is alive
if [ -n "$ISSUE_ID" ] && [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
  PID=$(cat "$PIDFILE" | tr -d '\n')
  if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
    MSG_TEXT=$(echo "$MSG_B64" | base64 -d)
    python3 -c "import json,sys; json.dump({'message': sys.stdin.read()}, open('$INJECT','w'))" <<< "$MSG_TEXT"
    kill -INT $PID 2>/dev/null
    echo "INJECTED:$ISSUE_ID"
    exit 0
  fi
fi

# Fallback: queue the message (room-aware)
ROOM_PREFIX=""
case "$ROOM" in
  *miZJJDwFQZDkuMcBqL*) ROOM_PREFIX="MESHSAT-" ;;
  *iXTnQsFJahUquYPDdG*) ROOM_PREFIX="CUBEOS-" ;;
  *AOMuEtXGyzGFLgObKN*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRNLLEI01PRD-" ;;
  *NKosBPujbWMevzHaaM*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRGRSKG01PRD-" ;;
esac
if [ -n "$ROOM_PREFIX" ]; then
  sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO queue (issue_id, message) SELECT COALESCE(issue_id,''), '$MSG_B64' FROM sessions WHERE issue_id LIKE '${ROOM_PREFIX}%' ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT 1;"
else
  sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO queue (issue_id, message) SELECT COALESCE(issue_id,''), '$MSG_B64' FROM sessions WHERE is_current=1;"
fi
echo "QUEUED"

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ msgtype: 'm.notice', body: 'Claude is busy processing. Your message has been queued and will be delivered when the current task completes.' }) }}

parameters.command: ={{ "touch /app/cubeos/claude-context/" + $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile }}

ROOM="{{ $('Extract Messages').first().json.sourceRoom }}"

if [ -n "$PREFIX" ]; then

else
  ROOM_PREFIX=""
  case "$ROOM" in
    *miZJJDwFQZDkuMcBqL*) ROOM_PREFIX="MESHSAT-" ;;
    *iXTnQsFJahUquYPDdG*) ROOM_PREFIX="CUBEOS-" ;;
    *AOMuEtXGyzGFLgObKN*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRNLLEI01PRD-" ;;
    *NKosBPujbWMevzHaaM*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRGRSKG01PRD-" ;;
  esac
  if [ -n "$ROOM_PREFIX" ]; then
    RESULT=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT json_object('sessionId', COALESCE(session_id,''), 'issueId', COALESCE(issue_id,''), 'issue_title', COALESCE(issue_title,''), 'paused', COALESCE(paused,0), 'lastResponseB64', COALESCE(last_response_b64,'')) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id LIKE '${ROOM_PREFIX}%' ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT 1;")
  else
    RESULT=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT json_object('sessionId', COALESCE(session_id,''), 'issueId', COALESCE(issue_id,''), 'issue_title', COALESCE(issue_title,''), 'paused', COALESCE(paused,0), 'lastResponseB64', COALESCE(last_response_b64,'')) FROM sessions WHERE is_current=1 LIMIT 1;")

=PREFIX={{ $('Detect Command').first().json.prefix }}
B64MSG={{ $('Detect Command').first().json.base64Message }}
ROOM="{{ $('Extract Messages').first().json.sourceRoom }}"
DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db
if [ -n "$PREFIX" ]; then
  FILTER="issue_id='$PREFIX'"
else
  ROOM_PREFIX=""
  case "$ROOM" in
    *miZJJDwFQZDkuMcBqL*) ROOM_PREFIX="MESHSAT-" ;;
    *iXTnQsFJahUquYPDdG*) ROOM_PREFIX="CUBEOS-" ;;
    *AOMuEtXGyzGFLgObKN*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRNLLEI01PRD-" ;;
  esac
  if [ -n "$ROOM_PREFIX" ]; then
    FILTER="issue_id LIKE '${ROOM_PREFIX}%'"
  else
    FILTER="is_current=1"
  fi
fi
PAUSED=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(paused,0) FROM sessions WHERE $FILTER ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$PAUSED" = "1" ]; then
  ISSUE=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT issue_id FROM sessions WHERE $FILTER ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT 1;")
  sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO queue (issue_id, message) VALUES ('$ISSUE', '$B64MSG');"
  echo PAUSED
else
  ISSUE=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT issue_id FROM sessions WHERE $FILTER ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT 1;")
  sqlite3 $DB "SELECT message FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE' ORDER BY id ASC;"
  sqlite3 $DB "DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE';"
fi

'No active session for ' + $json.prefix + '.' : 'No active session. Move an issue to In Progress in YouTrack to start a new session.' }) }}

parameters.command:
=SUB="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.sub }}"
RAW_ARG1="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.args[0] || '' }}"
RAW_ARGREST="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.args.slice(1).join(' ') }}"
ROOM="{{ $('Extract Messages').first().json.sourceRoom }}"
YT_URL="https://youtrack.example.net"
YT_TOKEN="REDACTED_YT_TOKEN"
DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db
GW=/app/cubeos/claude-context

ARG1=$(echo "$RAW_ARG1" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]')
ARGREST="$RAW_ARGREST"

# Room-aware project mapping
YT_PROJECT="CUBEOS"
case "$ROOM" in
  *miZJJDwFQZDkuMcBqL*) YT_PROJECT="MESHSAT" ;;
  *iXTnQsFJahUquYPDdG*) YT_PROJECT="CUBEOS" ;;
  *AOMuEtXGyzGFLgObKN*) YT_PROJECT="IFRNLLEI01PRD" ;;
esac

ytcurl() {
  curl -s --max-time 10 -H "Authorization: Bearer $YT_TOKEN" "$@"
}

lookupNumericId() {
  ytcurl "$YT_URL/api/issues/$1?fields=id" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null
}

patchState() {
  local NUMID="$1"
  local STATE="$2"
  curl -s --max-time 10 -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" \
    -X POST \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $YT_TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"customFields\":[{\"\$type\":\"StateIssueCustomField\",\"name\":\"State\",\"value\":{\"name\":\"$STATE\"}}]}" \
    "$YT_URL/api/issues/$NUMID"
}

case "$SUB" in
  status)
    ytcurl -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" "$YT_URL/api/issues?query=project%3A${YT_PROJECT}%20State%3A%7BIn%20Progress%7D%2COpen&fields=idReadable,summary,customFields(name,value(name))&\$top=20" 2>&1
    ;;
  info)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    ytcurl -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" "$YT_URL/api/issues/$ARG1?fields=idReadable,summary,description,created,updated,tags(name),customFields(name,value(name,login))" 2>&1
    ;;
  start|inprogress)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    LOCK_FILE="$GW/gateway.lock"
    if [ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]; then
      LOCK_AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK_FILE") ))
      if [ "$LOCK_AGE" -lt 600 ]; then
        LOCK_ISSUE=$(cat "$LOCK_FILE" 2>/dev/null)
        echo "ACTIVE_SESSION:$LOCK_ISSUE"
        exit 0
      fi
    fi
    echo "$ARG1" > "$LOCK_FILE"
    patchState "$NUMID" "In Progress" >/dev/null 2>&1
    ISSUE_JSON=$(ytcurl "$YT_URL/api/issues/$ARG1?fields=idReadable,summary,description,comments(text,author(login),created)")
    SUMMARY=$(echo "$ISSUE_JSON" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('summary',''))" 2>/dev/null)
    DESC=$(echo "$ISSUE_JSON" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('description',''))" 2>/dev/null)
    COMMENTS=$(echo "$ISSUE_JSON" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for c in d.get('comments',[]):
    a=c.get('author',{}).get('login','?')
    t=c.get('text','')
    print(a+': '+t)
" 2>/dev/null)
    B64_SUMMARY=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | base64 -w0)
    B64_DESC=$(echo "$DESC" | base64 -w0)
    B64_COMMENTS=$(echo "$COMMENTS" | base64 -w0)
    echo "START_SESSION:$ARG1"
    echo "B64_SUMMARY:$B64_SUMMARY"
    echo "B64_DESC:$B64_DESC"
    echo "B64_COMMENTS:$B64_COMMENTS"
    ;;
  open)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "Open"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    SESSION_JSON=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT json_object('sessionId', session_id, 'issueId', issue_id) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$SESSION_JSON" ]; then
      rm -f "$GW/gateway.lock"
      sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null
      sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO session_log (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, ended_at, message_count, outcome) SELECT issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, datetime('now'), message_count, 'open' FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null
      sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null
      echo ""
      echo "SESSION_CLEANED:$ARG1"
    fi
    ;;
  stop)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "Open"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    ;;
  verify|toverify)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "To Verify"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    SESSION_JSON=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT json_object('sessionId', session_id, 'issueId', issue_id) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1' AND is_current=1;" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$SESSION_JSON" ]; then
      echo ""
      echo "HAS_SESSION:$SESSION_JSON"
    fi
    ;;
  done|close)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "Done"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    SESSION_JSON=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT json_object('sessionId', session_id, 'issueId', issue_id) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1' AND is_current=1;" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$SESSION_JSON" ]; then
      echo ""
      echo "HAS_SESSION:$SESSION_JSON"
    fi
    ;;
  comment)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    [ -z "$ARGREST" ] && echo "NO_TEXT" && exit 0
    BODY=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'text': 'Message from Matrix: ' + sys.argv[1]}))" "$ARGREST")
    ytcurl -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" "$YT_URL/api/issues/$ARG1/comments" -d "$BODY" 2>&1
    ;;
  *)
    echo "USAGE"
    ;;
esac

=SUB={{ $json.sub }}
DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db
LOCK=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.lock

case "$SUB" in
  status)
    LOAD=$(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $1, $2, $3}')
    MEM=$(free -h | awk '/^Mem:/{print $3"/"$2}')
    DISK=$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $3"/"$2" ("$5")"}')
    UPTIME=$(uptime -p | sed 's/up //')
    SERVICES=$(docker service ls 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | wc -l)
    LOCK_STATE="free"
    if [ -f "$LOCK" ]; then
      LOCK_AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK") ))
      LOCK_STATE="held (${LOCK_AGE}s)"
    fi
    SESSION_COUNT=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sessions;" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    QUEUE_COUNT=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM queue;" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    echo "HOST:$(hostname)"
    echo "UPTIME:$UPTIME"
    echo "LOAD:$LOAD"
    echo "MEM:$MEM"
    echo "DISK:$DISK"
    echo "SERVICES:$SERVICES"
    echo "SESSIONS:$SESSION_COUNT"
    echo "QUEUE:$QUEUE_COUNT"
    echo "LOCK:$LOCK_STATE"
    ;;
  processes)
    ps aux | grep -E 'claude|n8n' | grep -v grep | awk '{printf "%s|%s|%s|%s\n", $2, $3, $1, substr($0, index($0,$11))}'
    ;;
  *)
    echo "USAGE"
    ;;
esac

# Record feedback to SQLite if this is a reaction
FEEDBACK_TYPE='{{ $json._feedbackType || "" }}'
FEEDBACK_ISSUE='{{ $json._feedbackIssueId || "" }}'
FEEDBACK_SNIPPET='{{ ($json._feedbackSnippet || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
if [ -n "$FEEDBACK_TYPE" ] && [ -n "$FEEDBACK_ISSUE" ]; then
  DB_FB="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
  sqlite3 "$DB_FB" "INSERT INTO session_feedback (issue_id, feedback_type, message_snippet) VALUES ('$FEEDBACK_ISSUE', '$FEEDBACK_TYPE', '$FEEDBACK_SNIPPET');" 2>/dev/null
fi
# Log A2A review messages
A2A_TYPE='{{ $json._a2aMessageType || "" }}'
A2A_PAYLOAD='{{ ($json._a2aPayload || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
A2A_ISSUE='{{ $json._reviewIssueId || "" }}'
if [ -n "$A2A_TYPE" ] && [ -n "$A2A_ISSUE" ]; then
  DB_A2A="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
  sqlite3 "$DB_A2A" "INSERT INTO a2a_task_log (message_id, issue_id, from_tier, from_agent, to_tier, to_agent, message_type, state, payload_summary)
    VALUES ('review-$(date +%s)', '$A2A_ISSUE', 1, 'openclaw', 2, 'claude-code', '$A2A_TYPE', 'delivered', '$A2A_PAYLOAD');" 2>/dev/null || true
fi
={{ (function() { var sid = $('Format Session Response').first().json.drainSessionId; var iid = $('Format Session Response').first().json.drainIssueId; var DB = '/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db'; var GW = '/app/cubeos/claude-context'; return 'DB=' + DB + ' && GW=' + GW + ' && SID=' + sid + ' && IID=' + iid + ' && echo $IID > $GW/gateway.lock && MSGS=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT message FROM queue WHERE issue_id=\'$IID\' ORDER BY id;") && if [ -z "$MSGS" ]; then echo NO_QUEUED_MESSAGES; rm -f $GW/gateway.lock; exit 0; fi && COMBINED="" && while IFS= read -r line; do DECODED=$(echo "$line" | base64 -d 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$DECODED" ]; then COMBINED="$COMBINED\n---\n$DECODED"; fi; done <<< "$MSGS" && PROMPT="The following messages were queued while the session was paused. Please address all of them:\n$COMBINED" && unset CLAUDECODE && cd /app/cubeos && timeout 300 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r $SID --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions "$PROMPT" 2>&1 && sqlite3 $DB "DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id=\'$IID\';" && rm -f $GW/gateway.lock'; })() }}

=SUB={{ $json.sub }}
LOCK=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.lock
MODE_FILE=/home/app-user/.claude-mode

if [ "$SUB" = "offline" ] || [ "$SUB" = "online" ]; then
  if [ -f "$LOCK" ]; then
    LOCK_AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK") ))
    if [ $LOCK_AGE -lt 600 ]; then
      ISSUE=$(cat "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
      echo "BLOCKED:$ISSUE"
      exit 0
    fi
  fi
fi

case "$SUB" in
  offline)
    bash /home/app-user/scripts/mode-offline.sh 2>&1
    ;;
  online)
    bash /home/app-user/scripts/mode-online.sh 2>&1
    ;;
  status)
    if [ -f "$MODE_FILE" ]; then
      MODEL=$(grep ANTHROPIC_MODEL "$MODE_FILE" | cut -d= -f2)
      URL=$(grep ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL "$MODE_FILE" | cut -d= -f2-)
      echo "MODE:OFFLINE"
      echo "MODEL:$MODEL"
      echo "ENDPOINT:$URL"
    else
      echo "MODE:ONLINE"
      echo "MODEL:Anthropic cloud API (OAuth)"
    fi
    if [ -f "$LOCK" ]; then
      LOCK_AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK") ))
      if [ $LOCK_AGE -lt 600 ]; then
        ISSUE=$(cat "$LOCK" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
        echo "SESSION:$ISSUE"
      else
        echo "SESSION:none"
      fi
    else
      echo "SESSION:none"
    fi
    ;;
  *)
    echo "USAGE"
    ;;
esac

=DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db

if [ "$HAS_SESSION" = "true" ]; then
  echo "$ISSUE_ID" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo 'INVALID_ISSUE'; exit 0; }
  sqlite3 "$DB" "UPDATE sessions SET is_current=0 WHERE is_current=1;"
  SUMMARY=$(echo "$B64S" | base64 -d 2>/dev/null)
  SAFE_SUMMARY=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | sed "s/'/''/g")
  sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO sessions (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, last_active, message_count, paused, is_current) VALUES ('$ISSUE_ID', '$SAFE_SUMMARY', '$SESSION_ID', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0, 0, 1);"
  echo "SESSION_WRITTEN"
else
  rm -f "$LOCK"
  echo "NO_SESSION_LOCK_RELEASED"
fi

=MODE_FILE=/home/app-user/gateway.mode

if [ -z "$SUB" ] || [ "$SUB" = "status" ]; then
  MODE=$(cat "$MODE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "oc-cc")
  echo "STATUS:$MODE"
elif echo "$SUB" | grep -qE '^(oc-cc|oc-oc|cc-cc|cc-oc)$'; then
  OLD_MODE=$(cat "$MODE_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "oc-cc")
  echo "$SUB" > "$MODE_FILE"
  /home/app-user/scripts/sync-mode-openclaw.sh "$SUB" &
  if [ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ] && [ $(($(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK_FILE"))) -lt 600 ]; then
    echo "SWITCHED:$SUB:$OLD_MODE:LOCKED"
  else

else

fi

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Context').first().json.issueId }}"

while true; do
  while kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; do sleep 5; done

    PID=$!

    sleep 2
    continue
  fi
  break
done
RESULT=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$LOG" | tail -1)
if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then
  python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.loads(sys.stdin.readline()); print(json.dumps({'result':r.get('result',''),'session_id':r.get('session_id',''),'is_error':r.get('is_error',False)}))" <<< "$RESULT"
else
  python3 -c "
import json
texts, sid = [], ''
for line in open('$LOG'):
    try:
        e = json.loads(line)
        if e.get('type') == 'system' and e.get('subtype') == 'init':
            sid = e.get('session_id', '')
        elif e.get('type') == 'assistant':
            for c in e.get('message',{}).get('content',[]):
                if c.get('type') == 'text' and c.get('text','').strip():
                    texts.append(c['text'])
    except: pass

    print(json.dumps({'result': texts[-1], 'session_id': sid, 'is_error': False}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'result': '', 'session_id': sid, 'is_error': False}))
" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":false}'

**Files changed:**
- `meshsat/web/src/components/MeshSatOSK.vue` (new) — simple-keyboard wrapper, tracks focused text-like inputs, switches between full QWERTY and numeric pad layouts based on `inputmode`/`type`, auto-shows when `matchMedia('(pointer: coarse)')` matches, auto-hides on the first trusted physical `keydown` (USB keyboard plugged in).

Edge-case notes for the operator:
- Hardware-keyboard detection is one-shot for the session (any trusted `keydown` permanently suppresses the OSK). If you hot-plug a keyboard mid-session, you'll need to reload the SPA — this matches the typical kiosk use case and avoids flapping.
- Focus-out uses a 50 ms grace so OSK button taps don't tear down the instance before the tap completes.
- `mousedown`/`touchstart` on the OSK container are `.prevent`'d so taps don't steal focus from the underlying input.

$nf--FqMAUVH8yYMHLWkCkawTNUQ8BT8DupdUbhx.question: [MESHSAT-536] Two open questions — please pick one of each:

answers.body: *Q1 — Scope**
**A. Signing key only** (strict issue wording). Leaves X25519 encryption key unwrapped. Inconsistent security posture; I do not recommend this.
**B. Both Reticulum identity keys** (signing + encryption). They live side-by-side, have equal sensitivity, share one migration. Recommended.
*Q2 — Master-key absence behavior on upgrade**
**A. Hard-fail startup** if `HUB_MASTER_KEY` unset on an already-deployed Hub. Safest, but a one-touch operator action is required during the v1.7 → v1.8 upgrade.

**B. Soft mode**: if `HUB_MASTER_KEY` unset, keep legacy unwrapped behavior and log a WARN every startup. No operator step required; security gap remains until they act. Recommended only if you want zero-touch rollout.
Once you pick (e.g. `B, A`), I'll implement + run `make lint test` + `gosec ./...` before committing.

**Plan A — Minimal (acceptance-literal, ~half day)**: Add `keystore.ResolveContactKey(ctx, contactID, kind)` as a thin wrapper that takes a `directory.Store` (set via setter to avoid an import cycle), defers to the existing unwrap logic. Keep `GenerateAndStoreAES` as random-key generation. Add 1–2 tests proving the keystore-level method behaves identically to the engine-level one. **Trade-off:** ignores the "X25519+HKDF" wording in the goal; matches the four checkboxes exactly.

**Plan B — Full goal (~1.5 days)**: Plan A *plus* a new `DeriveAESFromX25519(ctx, contactID)` method that (1) loads the bridge's X25519 LT private key from `routing.Identity`, (2) loads the contact's active `KeyX25519LongTermPub` from directory, (3) runs `ecdh.X25519().ECDH(...)` + `hkdf.New(sha256, shared, salt=contactID, info="meshsat/aes-traffic/v1")` to derive 32 bytes, (4) stores it as an `AES256_GCM_SHARED` record with `TrustAnchor=local` (deterministic — same inputs always produce the same key, so both ends derive identically). Add deterministic-derivation tests + rotation tests that cover X25519 key rotation invalidating the derived AES key. **Trade-off:** matches the issue title/goal but requires plumbing the bridge's X25519 private key into the keystore and adding a new keystore method beyond the strict acceptance.

**Plan C — Stub now, derive later**: Plan A only, and create a follow-up MESHSAT issue ("Implement X25519+HKDF derivation for per-contact AES traffic keys") that links to MESHSAT-537 and MESHSAT-548. **Trade-off:** ships fast, defers the cryptographic substance. Useful if S1-01/S1-02 dependencies haven't fully landed the X25519 directory rows yet.

$W9tG7SoGzDYGwGMH95X1LwVM3Jnhe0HhqsNC7lv.question: [MESHSAT-559] Which approach for MapView symbol resolution?

answers.body: **Plan A — Frontend resolver (lighter, ships faster):** `MapView.vue` builds a client-side `nodeId → sidc` map by walking `store.contacts` (matching addresses to node IDs). CoT-type → SIDC fallback for anything unmatched. Pros: no Go changes; contacts already loaded for People view. Cons: coupling between Map and Contact store; no SIDC for TAK-relayed positions without a contact.

**Plan B — Backend exposes resolved SIDC on `/api/nodes` + positions:** Go handler joins `directory_contacts` to the node response so each node entry carries `sidc`. Pros: single source of truth, works for TAK positions too. Cons: extra Go work (~1 new file + handler change), more testing.
Plan A is the minimum for acceptance-criteria pass and keeps scope to the 3 files called out in the issue. Plan B is more correct long-term but expands the file list.

$tjyXWSFS1ypL0tpr3DVIYxEuSxSi6giJ1lzvbRt.question: [MESHSAT-561] Which signing key should sign the QR envelope?

answers.body: **Plan A** — Reuse the existing Hub `TrustAnchor` (ECDSA P-256) in `internal/directory/signing.go`. Consistent with snapshot signing; but the acceptance says Ed25519, so this would require changing the wording or rating accordingly.

**Plan B** — Introduce a separate Ed25519 signer in `TrustAnchor` (new `ed25519_signing_key` system_config entry, generated lazily alongside the ECDSA key). Matches the acceptance criterion literally and aligns with the Hub/bridge contact-key "Ed25519" algorithm convention.
[POLL] Which Ed25519 key goes *inside* the payload as "signing_pubkey"?

**Plan X** — The contact's own `ContactKey` where `Algorithm="Ed25519"` and `Status="active"` (most recent). Matches the acceptance wording "signing pubkey" = the contact's pubkey — the recipient of the QR scan learns how to verify future messages signed by that contact. Returns 409 if the contact has no active Ed25519 key.

**Plan Y** — The Hub's signing pubkey (useful for trust-anchor bootstrap, but redundant with the provisioning bundle from MESHSAT-539, and "signing pubkey" in a contact card conventionally means the contact's own).
My recommendation: **B + X** — literal acceptance match, and "signing pubkey" naturally reads as the contact's.
S1-02 is listed as a blocker — I don't know what ticket that maps to. If it's unresolved I should wait; please confirm it's unblocked before I implement.
## Proposed Actions

1. `internal/directory/qr.go` — new file: `BuildContactQR(c *Contact, anchor *TrustAnchor) (uri string, err error)`, canonical CBOR, envelope `{v:1, payload, sig, alg:"Ed25519"}`, URI `meshsat://contact/<b64url(cbor_envelope)>`. Plus `ParseContactQR` for round-trip tests.

2. `internal/directory/signing.go` — extend `TrustAnchor` with Ed25519 keypair (if Plan B) stored under new system_config key `directory_qr_signing_key`; expose `SignEd25519(msg) []byte` and `Ed25519PublicKey() []byte`.

3. `internal/api/directory.go` — add `GetContactQR` handler, wire route in the router file (check `cmd/meshsat-hub/main.go` or `internal/api/routes.go`), tenant-scoped, returns `{uri, png_base64}` JSON with Swagger annotations. Use `readJSON` pattern only for inputs; this is a GET.

4. Tests: `qr_test.go` (CBOR canonical roundtrip, signature verify, tamper detection, missing Ed25519 key → error), `directory_test.go` handler test (200 happy path, 404 unknown, 409 no-key, tenant leak guard).
5. Browser/Android parser parity is out of scope for this repo but the CBOR layout + envelope will be documented in the qr.go package comment so both consumers can mirror it.

$5YBoSrnDR8q9cUydSEiUEKB0xiX3_Gag0GV28AJ.question: [MESHSAT-577] Which approach for the dtoverlay provisioning?

answers.body: **Plan A — Bake into Pi image at Packer build time.** New `releases/platforms/raspberrypi/scripts/10-display.sh` appends the two dtoverlays to `/boot/firmware/config.txt` (idempotent). Wire into `packer.pkr.hcl` combined scripts block. Trade-offs: simplest, one script; ships field-kit dtoverlay to every CubeOS user (harmless — ili9881 overlay only activates on matching DSI panel); requires full image rebuild + reflash of tesseract to validate, which also triggers `chore: bump version` workflow.

**Plan B — Kit-first-boot marker pattern.** New `releases/firstboot/cubeos-field-kit-provision.sh` that runs once when `/boot/firmware/cubeos-field-kit` marker file exists; idempotently appends the overlays and touches a completion flag. Hook into `cubeos-first-boot.sh`. Future expansion slot for PSU_MAX_CURRENT + UART2-pi5 (fulfills the deferral comment's intent). Trade-offs: more code + establishes a pattern; only activates on field kits (marker shipped on SD); needs image rebuild to install the script, but tesseract can be provisioned immediately via marker without reshipping kit-specific overlays to general users.

**Plan C — One-off on tesseract.** SSH in, append two lines, reboot. Validates the smoketest but fails the AC's "provisioning" intent; next reflash wipes it. Only useful as a pre-implementation sanity check on the overlay itself.

My recommendation: **Plan B** — matches the deferral comment's stated direction, keeps field-kit config out of general user images, and gives you a clean slot to close MESHSAT-523 (PSU_MAX_CURRENT) and the UART2-pi5 work next without re-architecting. Cost is one extra script + one hook.

=GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
DB="$GW/gateway.db"
MSG_B64="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.base64Message }}"
ROOM="{{ $('Extract Messages').first().json.sourceRoom }}"
LOCK_FILE="{{ $('Derive Slot').first().json.lockFile }}"

# Get issue ID from slot-specific lock file
ISSUE_ID=""
if [ -f "$GW/$LOCK_FILE" ]; then
  ISSUE_ID=$(cat "$GW/$LOCK_FILE" | tr -d '\n')
fi

PIDFILE="/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"

# Try inject if PID file exists and PID is alive
if [ -n "$ISSUE_ID" ] && [ -f "$PIDFILE" ]; then
  PID=$(cat "$PIDFILE" | tr -d '\n')
  if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
    MSG_TEXT=$(echo "$MSG_B64" | base64 -d)
    python3 -c "import json,sys; json.dump({'message': sys.stdin.read()}, open('$INJECT','w'))" <<< "$MSG_TEXT"
    kill -INT $PID 2>/dev/null
    echo "INJECTED:$ISSUE_ID"
    exit 0
  fi
fi

# Fallback: queue the message (room-aware)
ROOM_PREFIX=""
case "$ROOM" in
  *miZJJDwFQZDkuMcBqL*) ROOM_PREFIX="MESHSAT-" ;;
  *iXTnQsFJahUquYPDdG*) ROOM_PREFIX="CUBEOS-" ;;
  *AOMuEtXGyzGFLgObKN*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRNLLEI01PRD-" ;;
  *NKosBPujbWMevzHaaM*) ROOM_PREFIX="IFRGRSKG01PRD-" ;;
esac
if [ -n "$ROOM_PREFIX" ]; then
  sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO queue (issue_id, message) SELECT COALESCE(issue_id,''), '$MSG_B64' FROM sessions WHERE issue_id LIKE '${ROOM_PREFIX}%' ORDER BY last_active DESC LIMIT 1;"
else
  sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO queue (issue_id, message) SELECT COALESCE(issue_id,''), '$MSG_B64' FROM sessions WHERE is_current=1;"
fi
echo "QUEUED"

parameters.command:
=SUB="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.sub }}"
RAW_ARG1="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.args[0] || '' }}"
RAW_ARGREST="{{ $('Detect Command').first().json.args.slice(1).join(' ') }}"
ROOM="{{ $('Extract Messages').first().json.sourceRoom }}"
YT_URL="https://youtrack.example.net"
YT_TOKEN="REDACTED_YT_TOKEN"
DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db
GW=/app/cubeos/claude-context

ARG1=$(echo "$RAW_ARG1" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]')
ARGREST="$RAW_ARGREST"

# Room-aware project mapping
YT_PROJECT="CUBEOS"
case "$ROOM" in
  *miZJJDwFQZDkuMcBqL*) YT_PROJECT="MESHSAT" ;;
  *iXTnQsFJahUquYPDdG*) YT_PROJECT="CUBEOS" ;;
  *AOMuEtXGyzGFLgObKN*) YT_PROJECT="IFRNLLEI01PRD" ;;
esac

ytcurl() {
  curl -s --max-time 10 -H "Authorization: Bearer $YT_TOKEN" "$@"
}

lookupNumericId() {
  ytcurl "$YT_URL/api/issues/$1?fields=id" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('id',''))" 2>/dev/null
}

patchState() {
  local NUMID="$1"
  local STATE="$2"
  curl -s --max-time 10 -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" \
    -X POST \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $YT_TOKEN" \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d "{\"customFields\":[{\"\$type\":\"StateIssueCustomField\",\"name\":\"State\",\"value\":{\"name\":\"$STATE\"}}]}" \
    "$YT_URL/api/issues/$NUMID"
}

case "$SUB" in
  status)
    ytcurl -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" "$YT_URL/api/issues?query=project%3A${YT_PROJECT}%20State%3A%7BIn%20Progress%7D%2COpen&fields=idReadable,summary,customFields(name,value(name))&\$top=20" 2>&1
    ;;
  info)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    ytcurl -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" "$YT_URL/api/issues/$ARG1?fields=idReadable,summary,description,created,updated,tags(name),customFields(name,value(name,login))" 2>&1
    ;;
  start|inprogress)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    LOCK_FILE="$GW/gateway.lock"
    if [ -f "$LOCK_FILE" ]; then
      LOCK_AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK_FILE") ))
      if [ "$LOCK_AGE" -lt 600 ]; then
        LOCK_ISSUE=$(cat "$LOCK_FILE" 2>/dev/null)
        echo "ACTIVE_SESSION:$LOCK_ISSUE"
        exit 0
      fi
    fi
    echo "$ARG1" > "$LOCK_FILE"
    patchState "$NUMID" "In Progress" >/dev/null 2>&1
    ISSUE_JSON=$(ytcurl "$YT_URL/api/issues/$ARG1?fields=idReadable,summary,description,comments(text,author(login),created)")
    SUMMARY=$(echo "$ISSUE_JSON" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('summary',''))" 2>/dev/null)
    DESC=$(echo "$ISSUE_JSON" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('description',''))" 2>/dev/null)
    COMMENTS=$(echo "$ISSUE_JSON" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for c in d.get('comments',[]):
    a=c.get('author',{}).get('login','?')
    t=c.get('text','')
    print(a+': '+t)
" 2>/dev/null)
    B64_SUMMARY=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | base64 -w0)
    B64_DESC=$(echo "$DESC" | base64 -w0)
    B64_COMMENTS=$(echo "$COMMENTS" | base64 -w0)
    echo "START_SESSION:$ARG1"
    echo "B64_SUMMARY:$B64_SUMMARY"
    echo "B64_DESC:$B64_DESC"
    echo "B64_COMMENTS:$B64_COMMENTS"
    ;;
  open)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "Open"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    SESSION_JSON=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT json_object('sessionId', session_id, 'issueId', issue_id) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$SESSION_JSON" ]; then
      rm -f "$GW/gateway.lock"
      sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null
      sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT INTO session_log (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, ended_at, message_count, outcome) SELECT issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, datetime('now'), message_count, 'open' FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null
      sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1';" 2>/dev/null
      echo ""
      echo "SESSION_CLEANED:$ARG1"
    fi
    ;;
  stop)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "Open"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    ;;
  verify|toverify)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "To Verify"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    SESSION_JSON=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT json_object('sessionId', session_id, 'issueId', issue_id) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1' AND is_current=1;" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$SESSION_JSON" ]; then
      echo ""
      echo "HAS_SESSION:$SESSION_JSON"
    fi
    ;;
  done|close)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    NUMID=$(lookupNumericId "$ARG1")
    [ -z "$NUMID" ] && echo "LOOKUP_FAILED:$ARG1" && exit 0
    patchState "$NUMID" "Done"
    touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ARG1"
    SESSION_JSON=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT json_object('sessionId', session_id, 'issueId', issue_id) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ARG1' AND is_current=1;" 2>/dev/null)
    if [ -n "$SESSION_JSON" ]; then
      echo ""
      echo "HAS_SESSION:$SESSION_JSON"
    fi
    ;;
  comment)
    [ -z "$ARG1" ] && echo "INVALID_ID:none" && exit 0
    echo "$ARG1" | grep -qE '^[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+$' || { echo "INVALID_ID:$ARG1"; exit 0; }
    [ -z "$ARGREST" ] && echo "NO_TEXT" && exit 0
    BODY=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'text': 'Message from Matrix: ' + sys.argv[1]}))" "$ARGREST")
    ytcurl -w "\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" "$YT_URL/api/issues/$ARG1/comments" -d "$BODY" 2>&1
    ;;
  *)
    echo "USAGE"
    ;;
esac

=SUB={{ $json.sub }}
DB=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db
LOCK=/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.lock

case "$SUB" in
  status)
    LOAD=$(cat /proc/loadavg | awk '{print $1, $2, $3}')
    MEM=$(free -h | awk '/^Mem:/{print $3"/"$2}')
    DISK=$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print $3"/"$2" ("$5")"}')
    UPTIME=$(uptime -p | sed 's/up //')
    SERVICES=$(docker service ls 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | wc -l)
    LOCK_STATE="free"
    if [ -f "$LOCK" ]; then
      LOCK_AGE=$(( $(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y "$LOCK") ))
      LOCK_STATE="held (${LOCK_AGE}s)"
    fi
    SESSION_COUNT=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sessions;" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    QUEUE_COUNT=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM queue;" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
    echo "HOST:$(hostname)"
    echo "UPTIME:$UPTIME"
    echo "LOAD:$LOAD"
    echo "MEM:$MEM"
    echo "DISK:$DISK"
    echo "SERVICES:$SERVICES"
    echo "SESSIONS:$SESSION_COUNT"
    echo "QUEUE:$QUEUE_COUNT"
    echo "LOCK:$LOCK_STATE"
    ;;
  processes)
    ps aux | grep -E 'claude|n8n' | grep -v grep | awk '{printf "%s|%s|%s|%s\n", $2, $3, $1, substr($0, index($0,$11))}'
    ;;

    echo "USAGE"
    ;;
esac

parameters.command:
=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Context').first().json.issueId }}"
SID="{{ $('Build Context').first().json.sessionId }}"
B64MSG="{{ $('Build Context').first().json.base64Message }}"
LOG="/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
PIDFILE="/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
rm -f "$LOG" "${LOG}.offset" "/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/nl/production ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) cd /app/infrastructure/gr/production ;;
  *) cd /app/cubeos ;;
esac
unset CLAUDECODE
MSG=$(echo "$B64MSG" | base64 -d)
nohup timeout 300 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" > "$LOG" 2>&1 &
PID=$!
echo $PID > "$PIDFILE"
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
  if [ -s "$LOG" ]; then
    echo "PID:$PID"
    echo "SID:$SID"
    exit 0
  fi
  sleep 0.5
done
echo "PID:$PID"
echo "SID:$SID"

=ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Build Context').first().json.issueId }}"
PID={{ $('Launch Resume Claude').first().json.stdout.match(/PID:(\d+)/)[1] }}
SID={{ $('Launch Resume Claude').first().json.stdout.match(/SID:(.+)/)[1] || '' }}
LOG="/tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl"
INJECT="/tmp/claude-inject-${ISSUE_ID}.json"
while true; do
  while kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; do sleep 5; done
  if [ -f "$INJECT" ]; then
    MSG=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$INJECT'))['message'])")
    rm -f "$INJECT"
    unset CLAUDECODE
    cd /app/cubeos
    nohup timeout 300 /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r "$SID" --output-format stream-json --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions "$MSG" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &
    PID=$!
    echo $PID > "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}"
    sleep 2
    continue
  fi
  break
done
RESULT=$(grep '"type":"result"' "$LOG" | tail -1)
if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then
  python3 -c "import json,sys; r=json.loads(sys.stdin.readline()); print(json.dumps({'result':r.get('result',''),'session_id':r.get('session_id',''),'is_error':r.get('is_error',False)}))" <<< "$RESULT"
else
  python3 -c "
import json
texts, sid = [], ''
for line in open('$LOG'):
    try:
        e = json.loads(line)
        if e.get('type') == 'system' and e.get('subtype') == 'init':
            sid = e.get('session_id', '')
        elif e.get('type') == 'assistant':
            for c in e.get('message',{}).get('content',[]):
                if c.get('type') == 'text' and c.get('text','').strip():
                    texts.append(c['text'])
    except: pass
if texts:
    print(json.dumps({'result': texts[-1], 'session_id': sid, 'is_error': False}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'result': '', 'session_id': sid, 'is_error': False}))
" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"result":"","session_id":"","is_error":false}'
fi
rm -f "$LOG" "${LOG}.offset" "/tmp/claude-pid-${ISSUE_ID}" "$INJECT"
